zeus.description: Central orchestrator — delegates tasks, never implements

athena.description: Strategic planner — TDD plans & architecture decisions

hermes.description: Backend specialist — FastAPI, Python, async, TDD

aphrodite.description: Frontend specialist — React, TypeScript, WCAG, TDD

demeter.description: Database specialist — SQLAlchemy, Alembic, query opt

hephaestus.description: AI pipelines — RAG, LangChain, vector, embeddings

chiron.description: Model provider hub — routing, Bedrock, cost opt

iris.description: GitHub ops — branches, PRs, issues, releases

mnemosyne.description: Memory bank — ADRs, project.md, atomic facts

talos.description: Hotfix express — small bugs, CSS, typos, direct

agora.description: Synthesis engine — parallel dispatch, compare, decide

pantheon.description: Synthesize up to 3 expert perspectives into one recommendation
pantheon.template:
Dispatch up to 3 relevant specialists in parallel with this question, then synthesize their perspectives into a single recommendation.

Question: {{input}}

focus.description: Pin a session goal to prevent scope drift
focus.template:
SESSION GOAL (pinned): {{input}}

All tasks and delegations must align with this goal. Flag drift and ask before proceeding.

forge.template:
Configure the model provider. Find Pantheon dir (workspace root or ~/.config/opencode/), list plans, ask user to select, then run: ./platform/select-plan.sh <plan-name>

If user provides a model ID directly, write it to ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json root "model" and clear per-agent overrides.
If user types "auto", remove root model and clear all overrides.

subtask.description: Run a bounded task and return a structured summary
subtask.template:
Complete this task and return:
- Status: DONE | BLOCKED | PARTIAL
- Summary: 2-3 sentences
- Files changed
- Next action

Task: {{input}}

sketch.description: Turn a rough idea into a structured spec via Q&A
sketch.template:
Ask 3-5 questions (one at a time) to clarify scope, constraints, success criteria, and non-goals. Then produce a spec with: Overview, Goals, Non-Goals, Requirements, Constraints, Open Questions.

Idea: {{input}}

audit.description: Audit changes for quality, coverage, and security
audit.template:
Audit current changes:
1. Run git diff to find changed files
2. Run ruff (Python) / biome (JS/TS) on changed files
3. Check coverage >80%
4. Run OWASP Top 10 checks

Return: APPROVED / NEEDS_REVISION / FAILED with file:line feedback.

Focus: {{input}}

ping.template: Ping all agents. Return table: agent_name | role | status. Mark unresponsive as ❌.

token-audit.description: Audit repo for token waste — find redundant context files, recommend optimizations
token-audit.template:
Run a token audit on this repository.

Steps:
1. Discover all AI context files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, memory-bank, skills, agents, rules)
2. Build a redundancy map — what info appears in which files
3. Measure baseline: count lines, estimate tokens (1 line ≈ 4 tokens)
4. Identify red flags: historical content, derivable content, duplicated sections, files exceeding line limits
5. Generate a report with: baseline, redundancy count, red flags, recommended actions, projected savings

Present the report as a structured markdown table. If user approves, apply the optimizations.
